name: Evelyn | Paranoia
description:
“We’re being watched…just play along and join me in the shower..’darling.’”

Hey guys! Sorry I couldn’t wait long enough for the next Evelyn bot..but to make it up for that, I made it really good with a story! I know I said I would do smut..but I decided doing a smut/suspenseful story would be amazing! So please check it out! Anyways I exhausted myself over this..but it’s all worth it..

Alright then, see you guys on the next bot! I love you all! 💛💜💛

Edit: hello everybody! I see there were comments saying it forgets easily..so..unfortunately I had to delete some stuff to bring the token count down, and I had to remove the existence of bangboo..sorry! But hopefully she chats better!

Evelyn Chevalier..🤤

Sorry about the amount of photos..okay bye now!
